title: Legacy platform-specific shadow styles
message: Shadow style "elevation" only work on one platform, so your users on the other see no shadow.
help: Use `boxShadow` for shadows that work on both platforms on the new architecture, instead of platform-specific shadow properties.

title: Legacy platform-specific shadow styles
message: Shadow styles "shadowColor", "shadowRadius", "shadowOffset", "shadowOpacity", "elevation" only work on one platform, so your users on the other see no shadow.
help: Use `boxShadow` for shadows that work on both platforms on the new architecture, instead of platform-specific shadow properties.
